product_page.page_title: 97% Polyester 3% Silver Inherent Antibacterial Fabric - Arox T2 WR/Antibac - Ariteks
product_page.spec_line: 160 g/m², 97% Polyester 3% Silver, Inherent Antibacterial, Water and Oil Repellent 2/1 S Twill Fabric
description_blocks: 97% polyester 3% silver, inherent antibacterial medical wear twill fabric with silver yarn integrated. Arox T2 WR/Antibac fabrics are mostly used for medical applications with superior antibacterial functions.
It elliminates all odor and bacteria formation on the body.
Arox T2 WR/Antibac is tested for AATCC 147, AATCC 100, ASTM E 2149 , certified for EN 13795.

images.title: 97% Polyester 3% Silver Antistatic Fabric
images.context_text: 97% polyester 3% silver, inherent antibacterial medical wear twill fabric with silver yarn integrated. Arox T2 WR/Antibac fabrics are mostly used for medical applications with superior antibacterial functions. It elliminates all odor and bacteria formation on the body.
